title: EaseonCS - HudPlus
description: A clean client-side HUD mod that helps you play more comfortably.
body:
## 🌿 EaseonCS - HudPlus **This mod requires EaseonCS-Core** Optional: ModMenu
## Overview A simple client-side HUD mod that makes gameplay more convenient and clear. HUDPlus displays useful information neatly on your screen without getting in the way. Settings Shortcut Key: Numpad 1 ## Features | Category | Feature |Default| Key | version | | :---------: | -------------------------------------------- |:-:| :------------------------: | :-----: | |`Screen` |`Show time and date at the top of the screen` |√ | |`all` | |`Screen` |`Display coordinates and direction at bottom` |√ | |`all` | |`Screen` |`Display FPS at the top left of the screen` | | |`all` | |`Screen` |`Screen Zoom (Adjustable with mouse wheel)` |√ | C |`all` | |`Screen` |`Show item name when looking at an item frame`|√ | |`all` |
--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
